name: davnoot-site
description: Davnoot Digital — static marketing site + serverless blog engine.

no-build-script: There is deliberately NO `build` script. Vercel serves this repo as a static
site with zero build step; adding a `build` script would make Vercel start
building and change the output directory resolution. Dependencies here exist
for the /api serverless functions, which Vercel installs and traces on deploy.
Run `npm run site` and `npm run bundle` locally and COMMIT their output.

scripts.check: npm run test && npm run site && npm run bundle
